name: nuance
description: Inputs requiring inference: implicit deadlines, domain ambiguity, priority signals. 80%+ to pass.

cases.input: Need to get the car inspected before the holidays
cases.notes: Should infer a soft deadline around the holiday season

cases.input: This is urgent — the server is throwing 500 errors
cases.notes: Urgency keyword + server context = work, critical

cases.input: Whenever you get a chance, clean out the garage
cases.notes: 'Whenever you get a chance' = low priority, no deadline

cases.input: Fix the leak under the kitchen sink
cases.notes: Home maintenance, moderate urgency (water damage risk)

cases.input: Prep for the standup tomorrow morning
cases.notes: Should infer deadline = tomorrow morning, prep flag appropriate

cases.input: Start thinking about birthday party ideas for Lily, her birthday is April 15th
cases.notes: Family domain (child), soft deadline well in advance

cases.input: I really should update my resume at some point
cases.notes: 'At some point' = lowest priority, no deadline

cases.input: Review the PR that Jake submitted yesterday
Renew my passport, it expires next month
cases.notes: Expiring next month = urgent, hard deadline

cases.input: Set up the baby monitor in the nursery
Research restaurants near the venue for the team dinner
cases.notes: Research task, team context = work, agent-eligible

cases.input: Water the plants every Monday and Thursday
I need to figure out what's wrong with the CI pipeline before the release next week
cases.notes: Blocking release = urgent, hard deadline next week

cases.input: Maybe look into refinancing the mortgage when rates drop
Get back to Sarah about the project timeline
cases.notes: Responding to someone = moderate urgency, work context
